title: Christopher Chuckry
content:
{{Top|rwp}}

{{Quote|I haven't done a lot of Star Wars fan art, however, today seems like a good day to post what I have finished. I have colored a lot of Star Wars comics though. Maybe that was enough for me to get my fix of the characters and environments. Those comic books happened a good number of years ago. Perhaps it's time for me to do some more fan art. I'm open to suggestions.|Christopher Chuckry in [[2015]]|<ref name="Frogrocket">{{Blogspot|subdomain=frogrocket|name=Frogrocket Illustration|archivedate=20250814121228}}</ref>}}
'''Christopher Chuckry''' is a [[Wikipedia:Canadians|Canadian]] artist.<ref name="Deviant" /> He worked as an inker and/or colorist for a number of [[Star Wars comic books|''Star Wars'' comics]] published by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]], including the [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (comic series)|comic adaptation]] of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']].

Raised in small-town [[Wikipedia:Manitoba|Manitoba]],<ref name="Winnipeg Free Press">{{WebCite|url=https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/arts-and-life/2021/09/21/riding-the-news-cycle|text=Riding the News Cycle|work=''[[Wikipedia:Winnipeg Free Press|Winnipeg Free Press]]''|author=Ben Waldman|date=2021-09-21|archivedate=20250727194401}}</ref> Chuckry studied art at the [[Wikipedia:University of Manitoba|University of Manitoba]] in the 1980s.<ref name="Uniter">{{WebCite|url=https://uniter.ca/view/an-artistic-chameleon|text=An Artistic Chameleon|work=The Uniter|author=Thomas Pashko|date=2024-10-24|archivedate=20250817042201}}</ref> During the [[Wikipedia:COVID-19 pandemic|COVID-19 pandemic]], he began drawing political cartoons, completing around 600 over the course of four years. In [[2024]], he was also drawing for [[Wikipedia:Image Comics|Image Comics]] and teaching part-time at Manitoba's [[Wikipedia:Red River College Polytechnic|Red River College Polytechnic]].<ref name="Winnipeg Free Press 2">{{WebCite|url=https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/arts-and-life/2024/08/01/drawing-inspiration-from-the-left-right-and-wrong|text=Drawing inspiration from the left, right and wrong|work=''[[Wikipedia:Winnipeg Free Press|Winnipeg Free Press]]''|author=Ben Waldman|date=2024-08-01|archivedate=20240815154639}}</ref>
